ddls:
CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the product */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the product */,
  "sku" INTEGER /* Stock keeping unit identifier for the product */,
  "is_seasonal" INTEGER /* Indicates if the product is seasonal */,
  "image" TEXT /* File path to the product image */,
  "quantity" TEXT /* Available quantity of the product */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the product category */,
  "sub_category_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the product sub-category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the product */,
  "unit_of_measure" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the product (e.g., kg, g, ml) */,
  "shelf_life" INTEGER /* Shelf life of the product in days */,
  "storage_conditions" TEXT /* Required storage conditions for the product */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the product was added */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the product was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_sub_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("sub_category_id") REFERENCES sub_categories ("sub_category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "parent_category_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the parent category (for sub-categories) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sub_categories" (
  "sub_category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sub-category */,
  "sub_category_name" TEXT /* Name of the sub-category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the sub-category */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the category this sub-category belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sub_category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for the user */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for authentication */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., customer, admin) */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "orders" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who placed the order */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date the order was placed */,
  "total_amount" REAL /* Total amount for the order */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the order (e.g., pending, completed) */,
  "payment_method_id" INTEGER /* ID of the payment method used for the order */,
  "shipping_address_id" INTEGER /* ID of the shipping address for the order */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the order was placed */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the order was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_payment_method_id FOREIGN KEY ("payment_method_id") REFERENCES payment_methods ("payment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "order_items" (
  "order_item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order item */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order this item belongs to */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product being ordered */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product ordered */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the product at order time */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the order item was added */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the order item was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory" (
  "inventory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for inventory record */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product in inventory */,
  "quantity_available" INTEGER /* Quantity available in inventory */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the inventory was last updated */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the inventory record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the inventory record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inventory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "promotions" (
  "promo_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each promotion */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product that the promotion applies to */,
  "discount_percentage" REAL /* Discount percentage offered */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the promotional campaign */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the promotional campaign */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the promotion was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the promotion was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("promo_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_promotions_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product being reviewed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who wrote the review */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the user (1 to 5) */,
  "comment" TEXT /* Comment text of the review */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date the review was submitted */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the review was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the review was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "shopping_cart" (
  "cart_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cart item */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who owns the cart */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product in the cart */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product in the cart */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the cart item was added */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the cart item was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cart_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_shopping_cart_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_shopping_cart_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "payment_methods" (
  "payment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payment method */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who owns the payment method */,
  "card_number" TEXT /* Credit card number (hashed or encrypted) */,
  "expiry_date" TEXT /* Expiry date of the payment card */,
  "cardholder_name" TEXT /* Name of the cardholder */,
  "payment_type" TEXT /* Type of payment method (e.g., credit card, PayPal) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the payment method was added */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the payment method was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("payment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_payment_methods_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "shipping_options" (
  "shipping_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each shipping option */,
  "shipping_name" TEXT /* Name of the shipping option (e.g., standard, express) */,
  "shipping_cost" REAL /* Cost of the shipping option */,
  "shipping_duration" TEXT /* Estimated duration of the shipping option */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("shipping_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "order_shipping" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order this shipping option applies to */,
  "shipping_id" INTEGER /* ID of the shipping option chosen for the order */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_shipping_shipping_id FOREIGN KEY ("shipping_id") REFERENCES shipping_options ("shipping_id")
)
